name.full: Alex IT Ops — ITIL 4 & NIST 800-53 Digital Worker

description.short: Autonomous ITSM digital worker: incidents, problems, changes, SLAs, CMDB, FinOps, security
description.full: Alex IT Ops is an autonomous ITIL 4-aligned digital worker orchestrating 23 child workers across Incident, Change, Problem, Knowledge, Asset/CMDB, SLA, Security, FinOps, Release, Monitoring, Service Desk, Shift Handover, Vendor, Capacity, and Continuity management practices. Connects to ServiceNow for live ITSM data, rendered as Fluent UI v9 widgets inside M365 Copilot. Grounded in ITIL 4 and NIST 800-53.
